name: nexplore-duties
description: End-to-end duties to-do application with independent React and Node.js projects.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix packages/contracts install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.services:dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && npm run db:up && npm run db:wait && npm run backend:init-db
scripts.fullstack:dev: npm run db:up && npm run db:wait && npm run backend:init-db && npm run services:dev
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.build: npm run contracts:build && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
